title: Homelab Network Buildout
description: Designing and wiring a segmented home network — VLANs, local DNS, a reverse proxy with TLS, and monitoring. A real environment that taught me more than any tutorial could.

title: Competitive Debate
description: Years of tournaments, research, and rounds — building cases, cutting evidence, and learning to argue clearly under pressure on both sides of a resolution.

title: Open-Source & Side Projects
description: Small tools and experiments I build in the open — automation scripts, web projects, and things I make to understand how something works.
